title: rosa trachyphylla var. campestris
intro: Rosa trachyphylla var. campestris, also known as the mountain rose or wild rose, is a species of rose plant native to the mountainous regions of China. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rosa trachyphylla var. campestris include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicinal products such as salves, ointments, and capsules.
